body: Jordan, great connecting with you earlier this week — I've been thinking more about what [NovaMind](novamind.ai) is building and wanted to follow up while it's fresh. The intersection of AI infrastructure and energy-efficient compute is squarely in our thesis at [Halfway Capital](halfway.vc), and your approach to dynamic workload routing genuinely stood out to me. I'd love to get a deeper technical walk-through with you and your co-founder, ideally before the end of the month when my schedule opens back up a bit. Would a 45-minute call the week of July 21st work on your end? Looking forward to continuing the conversation.
